sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27189" key="*diomh/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Διομήδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Jove-counselled;</tr_> only as a pr. n. <title_ TEIform="title">Diomedes.</title_> </sense> </entryFree>
